name: Traditional Alpine Bundhosen Shanko Brown
description:
Introducing our collection of Bavarian Bundhosen - the perfect combination of style and comfort! Crafted with intricate embroidery and unique designs, our Bundhosen offer a perfect fit with adjustable waistbands and suspenders. Made with breathable fabric, they are ideal for warm weather and can be worn for any occasion. Our durable and versatile Bundhosen are a must-have addition to your wardrobe. Shop now to elevate your fashion game!

Elevate your style game with our Bundhosen!

Practical and Convenient Features for Everyday Wear

Bundhosen are a traditional Bavarian outfit that has been around for centuries. These long pants are made from high-quality materials and are designed to offer comfort and durability.

Crafted with intricate embroidery and unique designs, Bundhosen have become a fashion statement that can be worn for both casual and formal occasions. The decorative stitching patterns depict traditional Bavarian motifs such as edelweiss, hunting scenes, and coat of arms. This embroidery is done by skilled artisans who have mastered the craft of intricate and delicate stitching.

All Features in a giff!

  • Double reinforcement (Double linen) for extra durability and longevity
  • Dual Color Embossed Lederhosen Bavarian Embroidery for a unique and eye-catching design
  • Made from high-quality sheep/deer leather for a soft and comfortable fit
  • Four buttons which are smaller in size for a traditional and authentic look
  • Full grain Lederhosen fabric for a premium quality finish
  • Handmade Traditional Embroidery done by skilled artisans
  • Knife pockets for practical use and convenience
  • Leather waxing: Double shaded leather with a vintage look for a classic and timeless style

Bundhosen are typically made from leather or suede, with metal buttons and suspenders that allow for a comfortable and adjustable fit. The suspenders attach to the waistband with buttons, while the adjustable straps at the sides provide additional comfort and flexibility.

Luxury and Comfort at a single place!

The breathable fabric of Bundhosen makes them perfect for warm weather, while the sturdy construction ensures they will last for years to come. They are also versatile enough to be worn with a variety of shirts and shoes, making them a great addition to any wardrobe. We offer fast and reliable shipping options to ensure that your Bavarian Bundhosen arrives in a timely manner. Our shipping partners provide tracking information so that you can keep up-to-date on the status of your delivery. Buy Now!

Product Details

Dual-Band Wireless Network Card 600m 11AC USB 2.4G/5.8G Wi-Fi Receiver for Desktops and Laptops, Driver-Free

11AC600 Dual-Band 5G/2.4G Wireless Network Card, USB WIFI Plug and Play

Advantages of Dual-Band Network Cards:

1. Dual-Band Network Card: Supports both 2.4G and 5G Wi-Fi signals, a true dual-band network card.

2. Full Compatibility: Supports XP, Vista, Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, and Windows 10.

3. Compact: Thumb-sized design for easy portability.

4. High-End Chipset: RTL8811 network card chip, for enhanced data processing and forwarding capabilities.

5. Extremely Fast Transmission: 2.4G 150Mbps + 5G 433Mbps, 11AC dual-band speeds.

Product Information
Name: FX-8811F
Brand: Neutral (OEM customization available)
Color: Black
Antenna: Built-in omnidirectional antenna

Product Overview
The FX-8811F dual-band wireless USB network card is suitable for wirelessly connecting desktop PCs and other devices, providing a convenient and fast way to access the Internet. It comes with a built-in driver, Udisk, for disc-free driver installation, eliminating the need for an optical drive.
Compliant with IEEE 802.11a, IEEE 802.11b, IEEE 802.11g, IEEE 802.11n, IEEE 802.1x, IEEE 802.11e, IEEE 802.11i, and IEEE 802.11ac standards.
Wireless transmission rates: Up to 150Mbps in the 2.4GHz band and 433Mbps in the 5GHz band. It supports WPA and WPA2 advanced security mechanisms, TKIP, AES, and WEP encryption, and can provide security for wireless network connections.

JOY-05 Left and Right Controllers:

1. Compatible with all versions of the Switch.

2. Features RGB lighting effects with multiple adjustable modes; supports burst mode; and six-axis motion sensing.

3. Large TMR Hall Effect electromagnetic induction joysticks, offering a comfortable feel, high precision, long life, and resistance to powder loss and drift.

4. Enhanced buttons: Liquid silicone function buttons ensure consistent press feel, improved rebound, and durability.

5. Finely tuned pendulum motor with adjustable vibration intensity and clear feedback, allowing you to experience a richer and more dynamic gaming experience.

6. One-touch wake-up function: wake the console from sleep mode with a single click.

7. Sweat-proof and non-slip grips with a scientifically designed anti-slip texture provide a superior grip.

8. Large battery for long battery life: Both handles have built-in 500mAh batteries for worry-free battery life.
